source: User reviewed standalone Control Room MVP and approved recommended UI refinement pass.

diff_table.current_state: Theme uses bright phosphor green plus cyan/blue highlight for selection, links, large numbers, and edges.
diff_table.desired_state: Tone down green into a muted monochrome terminal base; use white/off-white as primary highlight; replace blue with amber/old-gold secondary accent for focus/alerts.
diff_table.rationale: User likes monochrome direction but current green/blue palette feels too loud and blue is not working.
diff_table.risk: Palette is subjective; choose accessible contrast and keep accent use sparse.

diff_table.current_state: Home has status cards; Knowledge/Board/Builds/Validation/Diff/Settings are placeholder panels.
diff_table.desired_state: Add a clear representation of CodeWiki major areas: Product, System, Graph, Roadmap/Board, Builds, Validation, Diff, and Settings as entity panels or map nodes, with source-backed inspector details.
diff_table.rationale: Control Room should represent CodeWiki itself, not only status plus two visual views.
diff_table.risk: Too much surface could become dashboard clutter; keep it map-first and inspector-backed.

diff_table.current_state: System diagram uses simple column/row SVG layout; arrows can cross or sit on top of components.
diff_table.desired_state: Improve System layout with lane/group placement, more spacing, routed orthogonal edges, and edge drawing behind nodes so arrows do not cover components.
diff_table.rationale: Architecture view must be readable and use available workspace space better than current rendering.
diff_table.risk: Custom layout can grow complex; MVP should handle current architecture.mmd well without adding external renderer dependency unless needed.

diff_table.current_state: Graph view renders many nodes/edges at once, making relationships hard to understand.
diff_table.desired_state: Add zoom in/out, fit/reset controls, pan/scroll-friendly SVG sizing, and sensible defaults that show scoped or filtered graph slices before all nodes.
diff_table.rationale: Graph needs exploration controls and less initial noise.
diff_table.risk: Graph interactions can become heavy; keep first pass simple and keyboard/mouse accessible.

diff_table.current_state: Workspace views often add an inner terminal-panel/container, reducing usable middle space.
diff_table.desired_state: Use the workspace itself as the main canvas; remove unnecessary nested containers in central views and allow vertical/horizontal scrolling where helpful.
diff_table.rationale: The center pane should use maximum available space for diagrams and graph maps.
diff_table.risk: Need preserve visual boundaries and readability without extra boxes.

diff_table.current_state: Left and right columns are working and should remain stable.
diff_table.desired_state: Keep left navigation rail and right inspector pattern while refining center workspace visuals.
diff_table.risk: Low; avoid unnecessary refactor of working shell layout.

accepted_decisions.summary: Use muted green as monochrome base, white/off-white as primary highlight, and amber/old-gold as secondary accent instead of blue/cyan.
Represent CodeWiki major areas visually in the Control Room, not as placeholders.
Improve System diagram layout so arrows do not cover nodes and available space is used better.
Add graph zoom/fit controls and default scoping/filtering to reduce graph noise.
Use the center workspace directly as canvas, avoiding unnecessary nested containers.
Preserve the left navigation rail and right inspector.

assumptions: Amber/old-gold is acceptable as the secondary accent because the user approved the recommended pass.
The next pass can remain custom SVG without adding an external graph or Mermaid renderer dependency if it improves current usability.
non_goals: No redesign of the left rail/right inspector shell.
No hosted UI or cloud dependency.
